role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained within domain constraints.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil, and climate cues (steppe, chernozem).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed crop species (sunflower) and roadside vegetation.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Assessed road infrastructure, markings, and maintenance standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Analyzed camera artifacts and cross-domain regional features.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The agents provided a high-quality, visually grounded analysis. The failure to identify the ground truth (Bulgaria) was due to the image being visually ambiguous (lacking unique identifiers like signs or distinct architecture) and the agents' reliance on 'meta' camera artifacts which were not diagnostic enough to distinguish between neighboring Eastern European countries.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the flat terrain and sunflower fields.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly described the cracked, unmarked road.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly described the camera blur artifact.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: Bulgaria was not in the candidate pool.
